name: libconst-fast-perl
title: libconst-fast-perl
summary: facility for creating read-only scalars, arrays, and hashes
description:
facility for creating read-only scalars, arrays, and hashes
Const::Fast is a perl module for creating read-only scalars, arrays,
and hashes. It enables you to set a variable to the given value and
subsequently make it readonly. Arrays and hashes will be made deeply
readonly.
.
This module uses the builtin readonly feature of perl, making access
to the variables just as fast as any normal variable without the
weird side-effects of ties.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libconst-fast-perl because facility for creating read-only scalars, arrays, and hashes.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libconst-fast-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libconst-fast-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libconst-fast-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
